compiled_state.title: Add glob support to .test-index parse_test_index so wildcard entries match staged files
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
The parse_test_index function in pre-commit-test-gate.sh uses exact string matching against staged files. Wildcard .test-index entries (e.g., plugins/dso/scripts/*.sh -> tests/hooks/test-all-scripts.sh) never match individual staged files, making them CI-only coverage.

Fix requires:
1. Add glob expansion to parse_test_index so patterns like 'plugins/dso/scripts/*.sh' match staged file 'plugins/dso/scripts/foo.sh'.
2. Establish a .test-index authoring style guide: no broad directory wildcards without justification, to prevent a single entry from inflating required test sets for all commits in a directory.

Deferred pending style guide definition. See bug a1c9-a4b7 for full incident context.
